sections.sectionTitle: Israel mite in Kumpi Khat Ngen

verses.text: Samuel a teek ciangin amah in Israel-te' tungah thukhenin a tapate a koih hi
A ta upa' min Joel hi a, a nihna' min Abijah ahi hi. Amaute pen Beersheba-ah thukhente ahi uh hi
Ahih hangin a tapate amah bangin gamtalo uh a, sum ngah ding lam bek kin uh ahih manin sumgolh la-in thuman heikhia uh hi
Tua ciangin Israel upate kikhawmin Ramah-a Samuel kiangah pai-in
ama kiangah, “En in, nang na teek ta a, na tapate in nangma khekhap hong zuilo uh hi. Tua ahih manin minam dangte khempeuh mah bangin kote hong uk dingin kote-a' dingin kumpi khat seh in,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin amaute in, “Kote hong uk dingin kumpi khat hong pia in,” a cih uh ciangin hih thu in Samuel lungkimlo sak hi. Samuel in Topa' kiangah thu ngen hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Samuel kiangah, “Amaute in nang kiangah hong gen thu khempeuh ngai in; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in nang hong nial hilo a, amaute tungah kumpi hihna panin kei hong nial ahi uh hi
Egypt panin amaute ka paikhiatpih-a kipan tuni dongin amaute in kei hong nusia-in pasian dangte' na semin, kei' tungah hong bawlnate khempeuh mah bangin amaute in nang tungah zong hong bawl ahi uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in amaute' thu ngai in. Amaute limtakin hilhkholin, amaute' tungah a uk ding kumpipa' hih zia ding lak bek in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Samuel in ama tung panin kumpi khat a ngen mite kiangah Topa' thugen khempeuh a gen hi
Amah in, “Note hong uk ding kumpipa' hih zia dingte in: Amah in na tapate uh la-in a leengte-ah na semin a sakol nasem ding, leh a leengte mai-ah a tai dingin seh ding hi
Tua ciangin amah in ama-a' dingin a tul-a uk leh a sawmnga-a ukte, leh pawlkhatte a lo kho-in a an a la ding, leh a galsung nazatte leh a leeng nate a bawl dingin seh ding hi
Amah in na tanute uh paknamtui bawl ding, an huan ding, leh an em dingin la ding hi
Amah in na lote uh, na leenggui lote uh, leh na oliv lote uh sung panin a limcipen teng la-in ama nasemte tungah pia ding hi
Amah in na an leh na leenggahte uh sawmah khat la-in ama uliante leh ama nasemte tungah pia ding hi
Amah in na nasem numeite uh, na nasem pasalte uh, na bawngte, uh leh na late uh a gina pen teng la-in ama na a sem dingin koih ding hi
Amah in na tuuhonte uh sawmah khat la ding a, note pen ama sila na hi ding uh hi
Tua ni ciangin note-a' dingin na teelsa uh na kumpipa uh hangin note na kiko ding uh a, ahih hangin tua ni ciangin Topa in note hong dawnglo ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin mite in Samuel' thu ngai nuamlo uh hi. Amaute in, “Hilo! Kote' tungah kumpi khat ka nei ding uh hi
Kote zong minam dangte khempeuh mah bangin, ka kumpipa un kote hong ukin kote' mai-ah pai-in ka galte uh hong dosak ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Samuel in mite' thugen khempeuh a zak khit ciangin Topa' kiangah tua thute a genkik hi

Tua ciangin Topa in Samuel kiangah, “Amaute' thu ngai in la, amaute-a' dingin kumpi khat koih in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in Israel mite kiangah, “Mi khempeuh na khuapi ciat uhah ciah un,” a ci hi.
